/home/book/tmp/ToolChain/gcc-linaro-6.2.1-2016.11-x86_64_arm-linux-gnueabihf/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-g++   -O2 -ffast-math -fomit-frame-pointer -mcpu=cortex-a7 -mfpu=neon-vfpv4 -mfloat-abi=hard  -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc CMakeFiles/detect.dir/models/YOLO-FastestV2_FP16/yolofastestv2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/detect.dir/models/YOLO-FastestV2_FP16/yolo_cam_detect.cpp.o  -o detect ../ncnn-src/build-arm/src/libncnn.a -lpthread -ldl
